column1: #: name: $W\rightarrow qq$ tagging efficiency (vs official WP)

#: description: The signal jet efficiency and background jet rejection for the $W_{qq}$-/$Z_{qq}$-tagging working point used in the analysis in comparison with those for the nominal working points (''50% efficiency W/Z tagger'' in ATL-PHYS-PUB-2020-017). The definition of the efficiency and rejection follow the caption of Figure 4. Note that the efficiency for the nominal working point is not 50% since they are tuned using jet samples with different pre-selection.
#: keyword reactions: P P --> CHARGINO+ CHARGINO- | P P --> CHARGINO+- NEUTRALINO | P P --> NEUTRALINO NEUTRALINO
#: keyword observables: SUSY | Supersymmetry | Proton-Proton Scattering | Electroweak | R-parity conservation
